title: Effectively Optimized
description:
<THANK YOU FOR 300 DOWNLOADS>


This modpack aims to add optimization as well as quality of life mods such as zoom and much more!
body:
This modpack aims to add optimization as well as some very important quality of life mods such as amor hud and much more! Feel free to edit this modpack and add or remove mods. I highly recommend keeping the mods as is though. This modpack is based on sodium and fabric. The modpack is made for low end pcs or laptops but useable on all pcs/laptops.


This modpack is my first so my apologizes if things go wrong.
